changes: Restored vanilla-first CraftingManager fallback before arcane recipe matching.
Added Forge 1.19.2 CraftingContainer/ContainerDummy adapter for 3x3 vanilla matching.
Output take now consumes original craft matrix with crafting remaining items.
Arcane and generated wand/sceptre output crafting now share original SlotCraftingArcaneWorkbench matrix-consumption path.
Shift-click routing now mirrors original ContainerArcaneWorkbench and does not auto-fill the 3x3 grid from inventory/hotbar.
Added original click/drop and drag-splitting restrictions for output/wand/workbench slots.
Server-side canPlaceItem now rejects staff stacks in the wand slot.
forge_1_19_2_adapters: TC4DummyCraftingMenu replaces original ContainerDummy for RecipeManager access.
ItemStack.getCraftingRemainingItem handles original container item behavior through Forge 1.19.2 API.
drift_status: No invented GUI/search/button/catalyst mechanics were added; remaining legacy catalyst slot is migration-only.
